targets.query:
from(bucket: "stormos")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "marketplace_items" and r.action == "created")
  |> count()

from(bucket: "stormos")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "marketplace_items" and r.action == "listed")
  |> count()

from(bucket: "stormos")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "marketplace_items" and r.action == "viewed")
  |> count()

from(bucket: "stormos")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "map_requests")
  |> count()

from(bucket: "stormos")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "marketplace_items")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: count)
  |> group(columns: ["action"])

panels.title: Items Created vs Listed vs Viewed

targets.query:
from(bucket: "stormos")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "marketplace_items")
  |> group(columns: ["action"])
  |> count()
  |> group()

from(bucket: "stormos")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "device_locations")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: count)
  |> group(columns: ["action"])

from(bucket: "stormos")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "marketplace_items" and r.action == "created" and r._field == "price")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)

from(bucket: "stormos")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "map_requests")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: count)

from(bucket: "stormos")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "device_locations")
  |> count()

from(bucket: "stormos")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "marketplace_items" and r.action == "sync")
  |> count()

from(bucket: "stormos")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "map_requests")
  |> count()
